name: MAXXAM AI — Content Generator (Topic to LinkedIn Draft)

parameters.content:
## MAXXAM AI — Content Generator

**Purpose:** Generate a LinkedIn post draft from a topic and save to Google Sheet.

**ONE-TIME SETUP (after import):**
1. Click **Claude Model** node → Credential dropdown → select **MXAI - Anthropic**
   - If not listed: create new Anthropic credential, name it exactly `MXAI - Anthropic`, paste sk-ant- key
2. Click **Write Draft to Sheet** node → replace `1kUfK-wGp_cauo2jApFdm7cj863W7iBYZR9A3qLmx4kE` with your actual Sheet ID
   - Find Sheet ID in the URL: docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/**THIS_PART**/edit

**To Test:** Click **Test workflow** — uses pre-filled healthcare topic in Test Data node

**Troubleshooting:**
- Claude Model error → verify MXAI - Anthropic credential has a valid sk-ant- key
- Sheet error → confirm Sheet ID is correct and tab is named exactly `Content_Calendar`
- Credential test shows red but workflow runs → known n8n bug; the workflow still works

string.name: topic
string.value: How therapy practices can recover lost revenue from no-shows

nodes.name: Test Data
nodes.notes: Click Test workflow to run with this data. Edit topic/pillar/scheduled_date to test different posts.

nodes.name: Normalize Input
nodes.notes: Handles both Test Data (flat) and Webhook (body object). Outputs flat fields for the prompt.

nodes.name: Generate LinkedIn Post
nodes.notes: Basic LLM Chain. Claude Model sub-node connects via ai_languageModel port below.

nodes.name: Claude Model
nodes.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: Open node and select MXAI - Anthropic from the Credential dropdown.

nodes.name: Parse & Format Row
nodes.notes: Extracts JSON from Claude response. Falls back gracefully if Claude returns non-JSON. Builds full Content_Calendar row.

nodes.name: Write Draft to Sheet
nodes.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: Replace 1kUfK-wGp_cauo2jApFdm7cj863W7iBYZR9A3qLmx4kE. Tab must be named Content_Calendar.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, id: $('Parse & Format Row').first().json.id, message: 'Draft saved. Review in Google Sheet and set status to approved before posting.' }) }}

nodes.name: Respond
nodes.notes: Returns success response to webhook caller. Silently skipped when running via Test Data.
